ques: Locate a parking lot near the Brooklyn Bridge that open 24 hours. Review the user comments about it.
answer: Located "LAZ Parking - The 1 Hotel Brooklyn Bridge Garage" (60 Furman St, Brooklyn) — a 24-hour parking garage by the Brooklyn Bridge, rated 3.3 stars by users. Individual review comments were not viewable because Google Maps served a signed-out "limited view" that gates reviews behind sign-in; only the aggregate 3.3-star user rating was accessible.
